mapper.select:
select (select warehouse from scm_inventory where id= inventory_id) inventory,
(select supplier_name from scm_material where id= material_id) supplierName,
(select name from scm_material where id= material_id) materialName, (select specification from scm_material where id= material_id) specification,
(select model from scm_material where id= material_id) model,
(select unit from scm_material where id= material_id) unit,
sum(stock_in_quantity)
as allStockNum from scm_stock_in_item
GROUP BY inventory_id,material_id
